title: Manang trekking lodge
prompt: A booking site for a family-run trekking lodge in Manang, Nepal — warm, credible, not a tourism cliché. Travelers should see rooms, seasonal availability, and how to reach the lodge.

direction.name: The Trail Ledger
direction.thesis: A warm, field-note-inspired booking experience where editorial restraint and precise trail intelligence make a remote family lodge feel both soulful and dependable.
direction.signature: A continuous vermilion altitude line threads through the page, transforming from mountain horizon to availability chart to a step-by-step route into Manang.
